titleStmt.title: Translation of NLS Adv. MS 15.1.18, no. 62

p.seg: Let it be known by all the faithful of Holy Mother Church that I, Agnes the Countess of Mar,

gave and granted, and by this my charter made firm, to God and to the church of St Andrew, and to the canons serving God in that place, the church of St Finian at Migvie, in free and perpetual alms, with all ecclesiastical revenues belonging to the same church. With land, and with teinds to be fully given, to be held in perpetuity, as freely, and quietly, and honourably, as any alms are well, freely, and quietly held in the kingdom of the Scots. This alms I have therefore given to the said canons for the welfare of the soul of Earl Morgan, my spouse, and for the welfare of my own soul, and for the souls of all my ancestors and successors.

As witnesses: Countess Ada, the king’s mother; Alexander de St-Martin; Robert de Capella; William Gifford; William the chaplain; William Caperon; Robert of Newham; Maurice the cook; Alan of Invermeith; Edward [and?] William of Mar.
